div.p: Per-thread publication slots enable safe memory reclamation

p.strong: A node is freed only if:

ol.li: It was retired (removed from data structure)
AND no hazard pointer references it
AND the scan happens AFTER retirement The happens-before relationship is established by:

ul.li: Slots hold node addresses being accessed
Release ordering on write ensures visibility

text.tspan: // Now safe: node cannot be freed while protected
// Now safe: node cannot be freed while protected
// Node can now be reclaimed if retired
// Node can now be reclaimed if retired
